overview: Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET), established in 2004, is a private engineering college located near Ramoji Film City in the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India. Operating under the Lord Grace Educational Society and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Hyderabad, the institution provides co-educational programs focused on core engineering fields, electronics, and management studies.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE); Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Hyderabad.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (Computer Science, CSE, ECE, EEE, Civil)

placements.medianSalary: ₹1.60 LPA (As reported historically for technical streams)
placements.companiesVisited: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Wipro, Amazon, Capgemini, Flipkart

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily based on performance in state-level entrance examinations (TS EAMCET for B.Tech and TS ICET for MBA) or through national-level entrance scores, followed by the respective state counseling process.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions align with the schedules announced by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) for TS EAPCET and TS ICET counseling.

contact.address: Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology, Toopranpet (Village), Near Ramoji Film City, Choutuppal (Mandal), Yadadri Bhuvanagiri District, Telangana – 508252, India

scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible state category students can apply for the Telangana ePASS tuition fee reimbursement scheme.
